name: The Plainsman Restaurant
description: A full restaurant website built for The Plainsman in Vancouver, WA — warm branding, clear sections, and a structure built for local search and walk-in traffic.
scope_body: Branding, menu layout, hours, location, and a contact section built for a local audience finding them through search.
detail_body: The business can take this page, swap in their own photos, and have a live site the same day.
iframe_title: Restaurant website design for The Plainsman, Vancouver WA

name: Cascade Collision Repair
description: A conversion-focused page built for Cascade Collision Repair — designed to generate calls and estimate requests from local drivers who need fast, trustworthy repair service.
scope_body: Trust signals, services listed clearly, and a direct path to calling or requesting an estimate — built for urgency.
detail_title: Built to get the phone ringing
detail_body: Every section is structured to move a visitor from "found the site" to "called the shop" as fast as possible.
iframe_title: Auto repair website design for Cascade Collision Repair, Vancouver WA

name: Anoush Deli & International Foods
description: A digital presence built for Anoush Deli in Vancouver, WA — an authentic international market and deli capturing commuter lunch traffic with mobile ordering and a clear "Skip the Line" experience.
scope_body: Digital menu, mobile ordering integration, and a design that reflects the fast-paced, diverse character of the business.
detail_title: Zero web presence to full launch
detail_body: High-traffic location with no website — a single page and ordering link captures significant commuter lunch revenue.
iframe_title: Restaurant website design for Anoush Deli, Vancouver WA

name: Boba Tree
description: A visual-first site built for Boba Tree in Vancouver, WA — designed for a younger demographic with a high-resolution gallery, bright branding, and a direct path from social media traffic to online orders.
scope_body: Aesthetic gallery, menu display, and ordering integration — built to convert social media followers into direct customers.
detail_body: Currently social-only with no centralized home base — this page consolidates traffic and drives order volume.
iframe_title: Boba shop website design for Boba Tree, Vancouver WA
